title: Add RecursoLM v0 non-record submission scaffold
author: AVINASH0052

data.description: Two unique transformer blocks are reused recurrently across multiple recurrence steps to increase effective depth while keeping parameter count low.
Token embedding and output projection are tied.
Uses multi-query attention via GQA with one KV head.
Uses ALiBi attention bias instead of learned positional embeddings.
Learned recurrence gate blends current and previous hidden states.

novel_contributions: Recurrent parameter-tied language model for the 16MB track
Two transformer blocks reused across 16 recurrence steps
ALiBi attention bias without learned positional embeddings
Learned recurrence gate for hidden-state blending
Tied token embedding and output projection
Retains official int8 + zlib roundtrip export
